text: Request room block, suite inventory, meal room access, meeting room needs, late checkout options, and cancellation terms. Do not mention or invent pricing.
Request aircraft type, wheels-up timing, baggage handling, crew duty coverage, catering timing, and cancellation terms. Do not mention or invent pricing.
Summarize the recommended flow for players, staff, and operations with clear departures, arrivals, hotel actions, and risk flags.
